description: Natural language description of common misconfiguration symptoms
prompt:
/sqldbconfig-review

Our SQL Server 2019 instance has 128 GB RAM on a 4-NUMA, 64-core server. Max Server Memory has never been touched. MAXDOP is 0. The TempDB only has 4 data files. We have about 20 user databases — several were migrated from SQL 2012 and still run at compatibility level 110. One of our largest databases, OrdersDB, has auto-shrink enabled because someone thought it would help disk space. The transaction log on OrdersDB has grown to 80 GB through years of 10% auto-growth and DBCC LOGINFO returns over 8,000 rows. IFI is disabled. We are seeing PAGELATCH_EX waits in TempDB during peak hours.
expected_severity_summary: 2 Critical (B6 Max Server Memory, B10 auto-shrink), 6 Warnings, prioritised fix order provided
